mid = n / 2
t = (x - xmid) / h
res = d[0][mid]

t2P = 1, tP = t

div.div:
dt = (fwd ? t - (k-1) : t + (k-1))
dy = (fwd ? d[k][0] : d[k][n-1-k])
term = term * dt
res = res + (term * dy) / factorial(k)
